expected.notes: Employee name matches between employment letter and I-9, so the rule must not fire despite this being a data room compliance case.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'employment_letter_i9_name_mismatch', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - comparison.employment_letter_i9_employee_name mismatch
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
